title.en: Milestone 6 — Implementing a Resilient Data Pipeline (2/3)
title.es: Hito 6 — Implementación de un Data Pipeline Resiliente (2/3)

description.en: Build a resilient Prefect data pipeline in your company monorepo: implement extract-transform-load flows and tasks, configure retries caching and partial-failure tolerance, ensure idempotent loads with execution metadata, create a scheduled Docker deployment, and expose pipeline status and manual trigger endpoints in the backend — implementing your approved PIPELINE_DESIGN.md.
description.es: Construye un pipeline de datos resiliente con Prefect en el monorepo de tu empresa: implementa flows y tasks de extracción-transformación-carga, configura reintentos, caché y tolerancia a fallos parciales, garantiza cargas idempotentes con metadatos de ejecución, crea un deployment programado en Docker y expone endpoints de estado y disparo manual en el backend — implementando tu PIPELINE_DESIGN.md aprobado.

sharing.en: I just completed Milestone 6 — Implementing a Resilient Data Pipeline (2/3) with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy.
